title: Intricate Vintage Biplane Scene Coloring Page

funFacts: The early Biplane models played a major role in World War I combat and crop-dusting agricultural flights.
Vintage Biplanes featured two stacked wings, providing high lift and agility for early aviation, aerobatics, and barnstorming shows.
